title: Duck's Seasons
description: Seasonal Updates to Bring Your World to Life!
body:
![Seasons Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/84e6be8db9f674353d32581a7ad9a887de1eb35b.png)

## About Duck's Seasons

Seasons is a modpack that changes according to the season. What do I mean by "based on the season?" Every season will add something. Since it's summer, it adds summer-related stuff, and will get more summer-related stuff in later updates. This modpack is different than others because it changes per season and is a big revamp of things, including updates to most stuff.

![Serene Season](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53d9bdd3b7a734c7a88892ff20df73cd5c84de71.png)
## Serene Seasons by Adubbz

Since this modpack is a neoforge, it means this modpack has serene seasons, meaning it has realistic seasons with their realistic effects. But in Duck's Seasons, this mod is a core to the modpack because every season Serene Seasons makes it so I can make it a single season forever, meaning that once summer is done, the effects and the season itself change. And it will benefit at times.

![camp out](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/29abbaa9858d9eb6d4f6d23861326f8e2f80998a.png)
## Traveler's Backpack by Tiviacz1337

Traveler's Backpack is the forge and neoforge version of Inmis and works like Inmis. Travelers' backpack adds sleeping bags and other things that make going on long adventures, going out, has gonna to a whole different level, and with Create makes it even better.

![createee](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1a8965d3e40bd27bbc082ea2a4122c1b3b3852e4.png)
## Create by simibubi

Create is a mod that adds tech into Minecraft, and in seasons, it can help with farming things, which helps you with the harsh effects of each season. Besides that, you can do other things if you create and its addons, you can make a machine that goes to get you iron, diamond, gold, and more, create has endless possibilities, and with seasons it's no different.

![loading screeen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6df5ad3a4353d753a248c3db7eb5f2a0b3bc3719.png)
## Copyright Info And Credit
Thanks to every creator of the mods inside this mod pack. If it weren't for them, we wouldn't have any mods to use. Copyright: You can only give links to my mod packs and mods, but you can't make a profit, nor claim it's yours.
